fact_nuggets.text: Anger Point (Japanese: Anger Pressure Point) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Boosts the Pokemon's Attack when the Pokemon suffers a critical hit. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD If the Pokemon takes a critical hit, its Attack goes up sharply! MD RT DX If the Pokemon takes a critical hit, its rage makes its Attack go up sharply!

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation IV 1.1.2 Generation V onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a critical hit , Anger Point maximizes its Attack stat by raising it to +6 stages (regardless of its current stage). Anger Point will activate even if the Pokemon's substitute is hit. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] Anger Point no longer activates if the Pokemon's substitute is hit. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Anger Point has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a critical hit , Anger Point maximizes its Attack stat by raising it to +6 stages (regardless of its current stage). Anger Point will activate even if the Pokemon's substitute is hit. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] Anger Point no longer activates if the Pokemon's substitute is hit.
Raises Attack to the maximum of six stages upon receiving a critical hit.
Maxes Attack after a critical hit

crossword_candidates.text: Maxes Attack after a critical hit
